SELECT DISTINCT groupName AS title

SELECT groupName FROM torrents ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM torrents
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY entry_count DESC;

FROM torrents

ORDER BY unique_release_count DESC;

SELECT artist, COUNT(DISTINCT groupName) AS unique_entry_count
FROM torrents

SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM torrents
GROUP BY artist
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY entry_count DESC;

FROM (
  SELECT artist
  FROM torrents

SELECT count(*), artist FROM torrents GROUP BY artist

SELECT releaseType, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM torrents
GROUP BY releaseType
ORDER BY entry_count DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(releaseType, 'unknown') AS releaseType, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM torrents
GROUP BY COALESCE(releaseType, 'unknown')

SELECT t.tag, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM tags t
GROUP BY t.tag
ORDER BY entry_count DESC;

SELECT tr.releaseType, COUNT(DISTINCT tr.groupId) AS entry_count
FROM torrents tr
GROUP BY tr.releaseType
ORDER BY entry_count DESC;

SELECT tr.releaseType, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM torrents tr

GROUP BY tr.releaseType

SELECT count(*), releaseType FROM torrents GROUP BY releaseType

SELECT groupYear AS release_year, SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_downloads
FROM torrents
GROUP BY groupYear

SELECT groupYear AS release_year,
       COUNT(*) AS num_releases,
       SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_downloads,

FROM torrents

SELECT sum(totalSnatched), groupYear FROM torrents GROUP BY groupYear

SELECT releaseType
FROM torrents

SELECT T1.tag FROM torrents as T2 JOIN tags as T1 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T2.releaseType = "album" GROUP BY T1.tag ORDER BY sum(T2.totalSnatched) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents AS t

ORDER BY t.totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear

WHERE LOWER(t.releaseType) = 'album'

LIMIT 20;

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched

WHERE t.releaseType = 'album'

SELECT DISTINCT t.groupId, t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents AS t
JOIN tags AS g ON g.id = t.id
WHERE LOWER(t.releaseType) = 'album'
  AND LOWER(g.tag) = 'pop'
ORDER BY t.totalSnatched DESC

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents AS t

SELECT t.artist, t.groupName, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched

SELECT t.groupName, t.artist, t.groupYear, t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents t

WHERE LOWER(t.releaseType) = 'album'

SELECT T2.groupName FROM torrents as T2 JOIN tags as T1 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.tag = "pop" and T2.releaseType = "album" ORDER BY T2.totalSnatched DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT HomeTeam, AwayTeam, Datetime

SELECT MATCH

SELECT * FROM football_data WHERE (FTHG + FTAG) = 0

SELECT Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, B365D
FROM football_data
WHERE B365D > 3
ORDER BY B365D DESC;
SELECT * FROM football_data WHERE B365D > 3

SELECT Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, FTHG, FTAG
FROM football_data
WHERE League = 'Premier League'

  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Datetime) = 2016
ORDER BY Datetime;

FROM football_data
WHERE Div = 'E0'

  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Datetime) = 2016
ORDER BY Datetime;

SELECT Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam
FROM football_data
WHERE League LIKE '%Premier%'
  AND FTR = 'D'
  AND Datetime >= '2016-01-01' AND Datetime < '2017-01-01'
ORDER BY Datetime;

SELECT Season, Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, FTHG, FTAG
FROM football_data
WHERE Country = 'England'
  AND League = 'Premier League'
  AND FTR = 'D'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Datetime) = 2016
ORDER BY Datetime;

SELECT Datetime, HomeTeam, AwayTeam
FROM football_data
WHERE League = 'Premier League'

SELECT * FROM football_data WHERE Season = "2016" AND FTR = "D" AND League = "Premier League"

SELECT * FROM football_data WHERE Country = "Spain" AND FTR = "A"

SELECT Datetime, Season, Country, League, HomeTeam, AwayTeam,
       CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSH ELSE PSA END AS pinnacle_win_odds
FROM football_data
WHERE (HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'H')
   OR (AwayTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'A');

SELECT Datetime, Season, Country, League,
       'Arsenal' AS Team,
       CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN AwayTeam ELSE HomeTeam END AS Opponent,
       CASE WHEN HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' THEN PSH ELSE PSA END AS pinnacle_win_odds
FROM football_data
WHERE (HomeTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'H')
   OR (AwayTeam = 'Arsenal' AND FTR = 'A')
ORDER BY Datetime;
SELECT PSH FROM football_data WHERE HomeTeam LIKE "%Arsenal%" AND FTR = "H" UNION SELECT PSA FROM football_data WHERE AwayTeam LIKE "%Arsenal%" AND FTR = "A"

SELECT FIRE_YEAR
FROM Fires
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT FIRE_YEAR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
  FROM Fires
  GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
)
SELECT FIRE_YEAR
FROM yearly
WHERE fire_count = (SELECT MAX(fire_count) FROM yearly);

SELECT FIRE_YEAR
FROM (
  SELECT FIRE_YEAR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
  FROM Fires
  GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
) t
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR
FROM Fires
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY COUNT(DISCOVERY_DATE) DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT FIRE_YEAR FROM Fires GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'CA'
  AND FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY FIRE_YEAR;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, SUM(COALESCE(FIRE_SIZE, 0)) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'CA'
  AND FIRE_YEAR >= 2000 AND FIRE_YEAR <= 2005
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY FIRE_YEAR ASC;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE (STATE = 'CA' OR STATE = 'California')
  AND FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY FIRE_YEAR;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'CA'
  AND FIRE_YEAR IN (2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005)
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY FIRE_YEAR;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, ROUND(SUM(FIRE_SIZE), 2) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'CA'
  AND FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY FIRE_YEAR;
SELECT sum(FIRE_SIZE), FIRE_YEAR FROM Fires WHERE State = "CA" AND FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR

SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001
GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH counts AS (
  SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
  FROM Fires
  WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001
  GROUP BY STATE
), maxc AS (
  SELECT MAX(fire_count) AS max_fire_count FROM counts
)
SELECT c.STATE, c.fire_count
FROM counts c
JOIN maxc m ON c.fire_count = m.max_fire_count;

SELECT STATE, fire_count
FROM (
  SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS fire_count,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM Fires
  WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001
  GROUP BY STATE
) t
WHERE rnk = 1;

SELECT STATE, COUNT(1) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001 AND STATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STATE
HAVING COUNT(1) = (
  SELECT MAX(cnt)
  FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt
    FROM Fires
    WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001 AND STATE IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY STATE
  ) s
);

SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001
GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
SELECT State FROM Fires WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2001 GROUP BY State ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fire_count

SELECT COUNT(1) AS fire_count

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fire_count

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE strftime('%Y', DISCOVERY_DATE) = '2006'

SELECT count(*) FROM Fires WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2006 AND FIRE_SIZE > 100

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR >= 2000 AND FIRE_YEAR <= 2005
  AND STAT_CAUSE_DESCR IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_CODE, STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
FROM Fires

WITH cause_counts AS (
  SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
  FROM Fires
  WHERE FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
  GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
)
SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, fire_count
FROM (
  SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, fire_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY fire_count DESC) AS rnk
  FROM cause_counts
)
WHERE rnk = 1;
SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR FROM Fires WHERE FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT OWNER_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY OWNER_DESCR
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT OWNER_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires

SELECT OWNER_CODE, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count

SELECT OWNER_DESCR, wildfire_count

  SELECT OWNER_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count,

SELECT OWNER_CODE, OWNER_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count

ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT OWNER_DESCR FROM Fires GROUP BY OWNER_DESCR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count

GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC;

SELECT STATE, COUNT(STATE) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT STATE, wildfire_count
FROM (
  SELECT STATE,
         COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rnk
  FROM Fires
  WHERE STATE IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY STATE
) t
WHERE rnk = 1;
SELECT State FROM Fires GROUP BY State ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN CAST(CONT_DOY AS INTEGER) >= DISCOVERY_DOY
                THEN CAST(CONT_DOY AS INTEGER) - DISCOVERY_DOY
                ELSE CAST(CONT_DOY AS INTEGER) + 365 - DISCOVERY_DOY
           END) AS avg_days_to_control
FROM Fires
WHERE CONT_DOY IS NOT NULL AND DISCOVERY_DOY IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN CONT_DATE IS NOT NULL AND DISCOVERY_DATE IS NOT NULL
                THEN (julianday(CONT_DATE) - DISCOVERY_DATE)
           END) AS avg_days_to_control
FROM Fires;
SELECT avg(CONT_DATE - DISCOVERY_DATE) FROM Fires

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR AS cause, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_CODE AS cause_code, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_CODE
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR AS cause, COUNT(*) AS fire_count,
       1.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Fires) AS proportion
FROM Fires
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR AS cause, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STAT_CAUSE_DESCR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(STAT_CAUSE_DESCR) <> ''
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR AS cause
FROM Fires
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISCOVERY_TIME, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
GROUP BY DISCOVERY_TIME
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISCOVERY_TIME, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE DISCOVERY_TIME IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME) <> ''
GROUP BY DISCOVERY_TIME
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS discovery_hour, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE DISCOVERY_TIME IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME) <> ''
GROUP BY SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2)
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT CASE
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 5 AND 11 THEN 'Morning'
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN 'Afternoon'
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN 'Evening'
  ELSE 'Night'
END AS day_part,
COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE DISCOVERY_TIME IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME) <> ''
GROUP BY CASE
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 5 AND 11 THEN 'Morning'
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 12 AND 16 THEN 'Afternoon'
  WHEN CAST(SUBSTR(LPAD(TRIM(DISCOVERY_TIME), 4, '0'), 1, 2) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN 'Evening'
  ELSE 'Night'
END
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
